A specialist changes a treatment plan, but the PCP never gets the update. A nurse raises a concern, but it’s lost in the noise of emails and EHR alerts.

results.title: Pratheeka Palayil - Yiewsley Family Practice | LinkedIn
results.snippet: March 23, 2026 - Here are 3 smart moves you can make this week: 1. Target high-growth roles – Positions like nurse practitioners, surgical technologists, and patient access specialists are in high demand across both NHS and private sectors. These roles offer not just job security, but career progression too. 2. Level up your tech skills – Healthcare is rapidly digitising. Employers value candidates who can navigate EHR systems, telehealth platforms, and even emerging AI tools.
